## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Platform(s) affected
<!-- Mac / Steam Deck / Windows / Android / save editor / docs-only -->

## How it was tested
<!-- This is a game port — in-game verification is the gold standard.
     What did you actually run, and what did you observe? Screenshots welcome. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] No copyrighted game content or third-party binaries added (see THIRD-PARTY.md)
- [ ] Field-tested in the actual game where applicable (or noted why not)
- [ ] Byte-level changes verified against a real save (if touching the save parser/editor)
- [ ] Backups/recoverable-delete behavior preserved (if touching the editors)
- [ ] Updated docs/VERIFIED-FIXES.md and/or the doc map if behavior changed
- [ ] Didn't re-open a documented dead end (checked docs/README.md)
